name: codex
description: Get a second opinion from OpenAI's Codex CLI when stuck on difficult debugging, code analysis, or architecture problems, run a code/diff review (finder and adversarial-refuter passes), run a security review/audit or verification of security-sensitive code (auth, input validation, crypto, secrets), diagnose a bug, hand it a well-scoped edit to existing code, generate images with Codex's $imagegen skill, or offload rote throwaway work where nothing can go wrong. Always runs gpt-5.5 at xhigh reasoning on the fast service tier. Requires the `codex` CLI on PATH.
